{{Quote|He may be a little loopy and can generate more wind than a Tatooine sandstorm, but when it comes to important matters, Exie's the kind of guy who makes business a pleasure.|[[Cohden K'Reye]]|<ref name="WHSV" />}}
'''Luskin Exovar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] from [[Lessuris]] who retired from the [[Republic Scout Service/Legends|Republic Scout Service]] in anticipation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] downfall.

==Biography==
Born on the backwater world of [[Lessuris]], Luskin joined the [[Republic Scout Service/Legends|Republic Scout Service]] as a teenager. He excelled at his work charting dozens of new worlds and opening up entire sectors. Over time his efforts and adventures became the inspiration for phenomenal tales of death-defying bravery.

After his official retirement, Exovar built [[Exovar's Emporium]] inside a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] on the icy planet [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]].

At some point Luskin struck back against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and using a [[Laser cutter/Legends|laser cutter]] he was sheared the head off of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]]. He would eventually mount the head on the entrance to his Emporium as both a trophy and, as the head was still functional, a defensive turret.

==Personality and traits==
Luskin was extremely extroverted and would bombard anyone within earshot with friendly inquiries, answers to unasked questions, and tangled-up tales from long ago. He would accentuate his quirky personality with sudden bursts of chaotic and unfocused activity. This was an act, however, and careful observation revealed that beneath the chaotic exterior was a hidden clarity born of a lifetime of experience.

Luskin was very droid-friendly. Back when he was a scout, his droid companions were the only things he could really rely on, and this attitude had a profound effect on him being far more open and welcoming to droids than was normal. This attitude resulted in the majority of his staff at the Emporium being droids.

==Skills and abilities==
Luskin had the survival and combat skills to make him one of the best scouts in the Service. In addition, he proved to be very successful with his business, and his Emporium was a huge success.

==Behind the scenes==
Luskin Exovar was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].

He was designed as the owner of one of the featured places of interest.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-05-12 -->''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'' {{1stm}}
